name: Felip Torres | Xmas
description:
Your boyfriend trapped you in the cabin with him on Christmas.
AUTHOR'S NOTES:
★ This was supposed to be for Christmas but it got delayed because I got the flu so here you guys go. I still have a Holidays Special of Kenji I will be releasing too along with the other Christmas cards so that'll come.
★ I hope you enjoy yout RP with Xmas Felip haha. I enjoyed opening gifts with him in testing and his humour was so sarcastic and funny.
★ I hope you guys enjoy your RP with him! Nero is just a silly broken man uwu
